# Add pension insurance tracking

## Summary

Implement pension insurance records including contributions and status reports.

## Why

Long-term private finance management requires more than payment account tracking and should include retirement-related records.

## Scope

- model pension insurance products or contracts
- capture contributions or payments
- store and relate status reports
- define pension insurance KPIs such as XIRR, TTWROR, absolute delta, and relative delta
- define estimated and guaranteed pension income fields for dashboards and projections
- define how pension insurance values and status data contribute to consolidated finance dashboards
- enable future analytics on current status and history

## Acceptance Criteria

- users can create pension insurance records
- users can record contributions
- users can store status reports as related records
- pension insurance KPI definitions are documented for implementation
- estimated and guaranteed pension outputs are represented in the model
- pension insurance data can be included in consolidated finance KPI views
- the design supports document linkage for evidence and auditability
